title: Rembrandt
overview: Claire and Yves, trained as physicists, have worked in the nuclear industry their entire lives. During a visit to the National Gallery, Claire is deeply moved by three Rembrandt paintings. This encounter with these three masterful works will change them forever.

trailers.title: REMBRANDT Bande Annonce (2025) Camille Cottin, Romain Duris
